title: Create ProactiveEngine: context-aware suggestion generation
acceptance_criteria: Context parameter includes: recentInputs (string[]), learningContext (string), timeOfDay (string)
Generates suggestions from 4 sources: context, history, learning, ambient
Each suggestion has unique id, text, confidence score, and source tag
Suggestion text is user-facing and actionable
Confidence score filtered: only returns suggestions with confidence > 0.3
Returns max 5 suggestions, sorted by confidence descending
Handles empty context gracefully (returns empty array)
